physics_paths: Load Path: Structural loads from solar panels and antennas transferred through frame.
Flow Path: Electrical signals from onboard sensors to control electronics.
Thermal Path: Heat dissipation from electronic components to outer surface.
Motion Path: Deployable rail guides allow for satellite deployment.
Pressure Path: Internal pressure stabilization through sealed compartments.
